title: Justice and The Law Society
content: WHO WE ARE TheJusticeand theLawSociety(JATL) is a vital organisation within the TC Beirne School ofLaw, which has recently celebrated its 30th anniversary. An activesocietywith hundreds of members, JATL focusses on exploring the intersection oflawand socialjusticewhile helping students build their professional networks. Membership is open to students and professionals, for $5 and ...
